summary: Comprehensive E2E testing of AutoBid.bg negotiation flow and related features. All 27 backend tests passed. Frontend smoke tests verified AdminSettingsTab and NegotiationPortal components render correctly.

issues: Test auction images show broken placeholder (example.com URLs) - expected for test data

critical_code_review_comments: Negotiation flow implementation follows BaT Apr 2025 rules correctly (seller 24h → buyer 24h → seller final 24h)
_complete_negotiation properly applies buyer fee and updates auction to sold status
Settings cache is properly refreshed after admin updates
Variable bid steps correctly implemented (_bid_step function)
Comments is_owner flag correctly identifies seller comments
Admin soft-delete replaces comment text with moderation notice
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_* prefixed auctions created for negotiation testing, left in reserve_not_met/sold states
context_for_next_testing_agent: Negotiation E2E flow fully tested. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_negotiation_flow.py covers: settings CRUD, bid steps, direct bidding, comments with is_owner, admin comment delete, reserve_met visibility, full negotiation flow (seller opening → buyer counter → seller accept), negotiation messaging, and authorization. Frontend AdminSettingsTab shows buyer fee (2%), SEO fields, and content markdown editors. NegotiationPortal shows on reserve_not_met auctions with status, countdown, offer summary, and chat.

backend: GET /api/settings - returns public settings with buyer_fee_pct=2.0
PUT /api/admin/settings - updates buyer_fee_pct, SEO, content fields
GET /api/auctions/{id}/next-bid - returns correct step and buyer_fee
POST /api/auctions/{id}/bids - direct bidding (bid becomes current immediately)
Comments endpoint returns is_owner=true for seller comments
Live auctions hide reserve_met; ended/sold/reserve_not_met expose it
Negotiation auto-creates on GET for reserve_not_met auctions
Negotiation accept sets auction to sold with premium_amount_eur
Negotiation authorization - only seller/buyer/admin can access
frontend: AdminSettingsTab renders with buyer fee inputs (%, min, max)
NegotiationPortal shows status and countdown timer

mocked_apis.stripe_preauth: mock_pi_* tokens used for payment pre-authorization
mocked_apis.resend_email: Falls back to console log if no API key
mocked_apis.twilio_sms: Falls back to console log if no credentials
